# Sports Discipline Post Template

Use this template as a guide to creating new posts for any sport.
Save the file as `post-slug.md` in `src/content/sports/sport-name/`.

```markdown
---
title: 'Título Impactante'
date: 'YYYY-MM-DD'
image: '/images/highlight-image.jpg'
description: 'Resumo curto do post para a lista de novidades.'
images:
  - '/images/gallery-image-1.jpg'
  - '/images/gallery-image-2.jpg'
---

O conteúdo do seu post em **Markdown** vai aqui.

Pode incluir links para o [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CDInfante) ou outras redes sociais.

Não se esqueça das hashtags: #CDInfante #Desporto #Madeira
```

### Guidelines

1. **Title**: Keep it clear and engaging.
2. **Date**: Use the `YYYY-MM-DD` format (e.g., `2024-03-25`).
3. **Images**: You can use URLs or local paths from the `public/` folder.
4. **Description**: This is what appears in the preview list. Keep it under 150 characters.
5. **Slug**: The filename determines the URL part, use lowercase and hyphens (e.g., `nacional-judo-2024.md`).
